calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Mercedes Gavin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The John Stewart Company.
Vince Alvarenga, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Defendants Charlotte Cunh and Jon Jorgenson, erroneously sued as John Jones, were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 26, 2008.

Written Stipulation for Judgment and Settlement Agreement reached by the parties is adopted by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Off Calendar
